reviews.title: Hotel infested with ants
reviews.text: Sorry but the hotel management needs to know this.  I was there on the Feb 1st, 2024.  The room is full with ants. It was old.   The staff was not very professional.  They do not smiles.  Breakfast was an average.  I rated this 5 out of 10

reviews.title: Hasn't aged well
reviews.text:
Stayed here in 2014 and really liked the property. Not many options in Ben Tre at the time.  5.5 yrs later though the hotel hasn't aged well.

Shower would not drain properly so bathroom floor was always flooded after shower. Towels are gray and dingy. Safe in room but did not work, nor was it even bolted down. 

Staff was just so so. At breakfast most were playing with their phones. At evening in they bar/Cafe on the first floor the same thing.  The girls tending bar listening to their shows on their phones so loud it was distracting.

Overall I just can't recommend it and won't return. We'll seek alternative properties next time.

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ có câu chuyện buồn là gđ tôi nhất 1 chiếc nhẫn  KC sau khi trả phòng 1h sau mới liên hệ ks nên cũng không thể tr
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình,vị trí đẹp

reviews.title: Noisy foreigner scam
reviews.text: Just book the cheapest room because even if you book the deluxe most expensive room they will still give you the cheapest basic room and charge 1M vnd for upgrade to what you already paid for

reviews.title: Bình thường

reviews.title: Lousy staff!
reviews.text: Staff gave non or wrong info! Corridor had wild birds  flying around at afternoon!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Ok

reviews.title: Not very pleasant...noisy.
reviews.text: Unpleasant and noisy. Bathroom is not very clean. Amenities are of poor quality. Hotel looks nice from the outside but internally is very poorly designed and constructed. I could hear all the noise from the street and inside the hotel from my room.  In addition, hotel bathroom is not very clean. I could spot mildew growing in some area in the bathroom and particularly our bathroom smells like urine. It could mean that housekeeping didn't do their job thoroughly. Probably rarely mop the floor.  Some of the towels we got smell really bad. About time they get rid of those old towels that don't wash well. To me, this is more like a 2 stars hotel than a 3 stars. However, location is good, centrally located by the river and next to the market.
reviews.positives: Convenient location, next to the market, river view

reviews.title: Tuyệt

reviews.negatives: Water in the bathroom was not drained

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I would NEVER EVER recommend a friend stay at this Hotel. They allow guests to smoke in the dining room and in the foyer . NEVER EVER go there again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice staff and a nice view of the river .
reviews.negatives: The TV could  be more modern.

reviews.title: Poor facilities and service
reviews.text:
Poorly maintained hotel facilities.
Bathroom amenities not replenished.
Buffet items are not replenished, including coffee even though it was only 8am.Buffet supposed to be from 630am to 9am.
Tables are not cleaned and cutlery es not replenished.
This happened 2 days in a row despite complaining about it .
Staff are not well-trained to be alert, friendly or courteous.
Unless the management is serious about delivering the best of service uo it's guest, regular ones like my family are going to stop coming to this once well-managed hotel.

reviews.title: Nice position overlooking river.
reviews.positives: Comfortable spacious rooms

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Must improve a breakfast

reviews.title: Disappointing for a relatively expensive hotel
reviews.text:
While experiencing the fastest check-in ever recorded in the history of lodging, overall our stay was a little disappointing.  

POSITIVES:

- Karaoke room was a lot of fun, with good selection of EN songs
- Cafe at front of hotel was nicely situated, good place to watch the storms.
- Dinner in the restaurant (although deserted) was quite good quality.
- Fellow traveller had a massage - rated it around 6/10
- Easy organization of transfers back to HCMC

NEGATIVES:

- Breakfast was atrocious.  Firstly, they basically only had Vietnamese options (this is the Vietnamese - Australian hotel after all), and when food ran out they basically didn't replace it.
- Tried to order cocktails from the front bar.  Out of a list of around 15, they actually only had the ingredients for about 3.
- Bathroom door locked itself around midnight.  Receptionist answered very groggily after a while, and said he'd come up.  We had to call again 15 mins later as he'd gone to sleep.
reviews.positives: Karaoke room, view from room, cafe at front

reviews.title: Way Overrated
reviews.text: Not a fan of this hotel for a few reasons. Mainly, the shower in the room smells terrible - a fairly strong urine odor. Also, the room didn't come with a some of the features that were advertised. For example, the room I stayed in didn't have a safe so if you're traveling with valuables it may be an issue. Also, the rooms look nothing like the photos. I read that the hotel is only a few years old but the exterior and interior look incredibly old and poorly maintained. Won't return.
reviews.positives: Nice outside seating area, good view of the river, good massage

reviews.title: Disappointed with the hotel's condition
reviews.text: Overall the stay was good. Location are pretty near to city area and nearby the hotel, full of shopping and entertainments. Hotel staffs were friendly and help Except the bath room shower glass screen is broken and not safe at all.
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: The place was ok
reviews.text: I stayed here for long time, it's ok

reviews.title: Nice room. Staff don't speak much english
reviews.text: Old fashioned set up despite being the newest hotel in Ben Tre.  They keep your passport for the entire stay making it difficult to rent bikes, for example.  Staff don't speak much English so can't make themselves helpful.

reviews.title: Facilities are old & food are disapointed
reviews.text: tower is so old, feeling dirty, food is not much as before

reviews.title: Good value hotel
reviews.text:
i have stayed in many budget hotels and the price of this hotel exceeds the standards of budget vietnamese hotels. very clean and moreso like a 4 star hotel in australia.
breakfast buffet is excellent value, however, the feel of the hotel lacks a certain ambience. 
i had an unpleasant experience where the staff could not speak english and booked a bus for me to get to ho chi minh city. they informed me the bus would take me to district 1 for the price however upon arrival at the bus terminal in district 5, was told i needed to pay more money to get to district 1 and they just passed the blame onto the bus company.
reviews.positives: Clean and great value

reviews.text: The room is acceptable, but the toilet drains slowly and the door is very difficult to open. The hotel needs renovation to match its 3-star rating.
reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý Khách!
Khách sạn VIỆT ÚC xin gửi lời cám ơn chân thành và sâu sắc nhất đến Quý khách hàng đã tin tưởng và sử dụng dịch vụ của chúng tôi. Sự tin tưởng của quý vị đã góp phần lớn quyết định sự phát triển và thành công của khách sạn trong thời gian qua.
Chúng tôi cũng hy vọng trong thời gian tới sẽ tiếp tục nhận được sự quan tâm và tín nhiệm của Quý khách.
Xin chúc quý khách hàng sức khỏe, may mắn và thành công
Trân Trọng!

reviews.title: We have a good time while stay in this hotel .
reviews.text: We have a good time while stay in this hotel,excellent staff and service except foos for breakfast as we state above.we suggest  the hotel management keep an eye about add more western food in the menu.
reviews.positives: Staff,service is very good,except food for breakfast it is very poor did not have any western food .

reviews.title: Comfortable, Clean, A Little Pretentious
reviews.text: My stay was pretty good. It took awhile to convince them that the first room they gave me had a broken air conditioner. It was definitely a bit of an inconvenience to have to switch rooms after long travel.  I stayed here last year when it first opened in 2012. Although only one year old, it looks to me like it is more like 3 years old. Perhaps the finishings are not high quality, but they definitely have some maintenance issues. I would not be so nitpicky if the hotel did not bill itself as a high end luxury hotel.
reviews.positives: Clean Room, Great Breakfas Buffet, River View

reviews.title: Great location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the city center, next to the cool riverside. The staff is very attentive and friendly.

reviews.title: good choice for a stopover
reviews.text: We stayed one night. The rooms were clean, one had a nice view on the river. The restaurant was good, service lovely but did not really speak English. There was little choice of continental breakfast on the breakfast buffet, but a good choice of local dishes. The hotel is located next to the market so its easy to explore the town by foot.
reviews.positives: clean, spacious, river view

reviews.title: great location for family wedding
reviews.text: Hotel and rooms great and good value fore money. Breakfast was very poor for western travellers and there were 20 in our group. English language skills very poor in hotel.
reviews.positives: rooms great, hotel very clean, great value fore money

reviews.title: Good value hotel
reviews.text: Comfortable. English language skills of staff were minimal and we struggled to communicate some needs. Breakfast was average and whilst we appreciate the authenticity of the menu we would have liked some western options ie butter and toast. The bathrooms had no face washers/flannels so I had to use a hand towel for my face. I was then charged for a towel because it had makeup on it!
reviews.positives: big, comfortable, affordable rooms

reviews.title: Very comfortable, great value for money
reviews.text: We had a twin room for 19 pounds per night and were extremely satisfied with the room for this money. Hotel entrance is very grand, room was large and very comfy bed; great shower. Wifi not great in room but good in other areas of hotel. Good variety of food in restaurant but overpriced and we were disappointed with the local food served there. Cafe/bar was lovely and they served the best hot chocolate !! Location was great, Ben Tre is quite a quiet place and tours were limited and expensive - we hired bikes for the day.
reviews.positives: comfort, location and bar

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Breakfast very limited...not so good in choices... Should be a buffet

reviews.title: A touch of luxury after 2 star hotels
reviews.text: We had a lovely stay. Dining room needs to have mosquito control. Our lovely bathroom was spoiled by a shower that leaked around glass surround to flood floor. This meant we had to sit sideways on toilet to stay dry!  I did report this issue. Quite a grand room.
reviews.positives: Majestic entry / foyer/lounge.  On the River. Touch of class for a country area Hotel.

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: I stayed only one night at Viet Uc but was pleasantly surprised by the large room and river view which i got for a great price. The breakfast was nice and staff were always eager to help. Ben Tre was a quiet town and a lovely respite from HCMC, and certainly looked like one of the best places to stay in town.
reviews.positives: Price , location and value

reviews.title: The hotel is new and nice
reviews.text: The level of room was excellent for its price. However, there is a limitation of the room type of this Superior Double. It should be no problem if you come to stay during weekdays. You'd better book this room type in advance if don't want to waste some more for a same stay. Minus point is breakfast buffet, the food was exceptionally bad value for money. They also didn't invest much on dining room since it is dark and poor decorated. I skipped the breakfast and went for a breakfast outside myself. It didn't cost much for food in Ben Tre, thus I got a delicious bowl of rice noodle at VND25,000 (app. 1.2$) with vary choices of vegetable and bean sprout. I love healthy food!!!
reviews.positives: Since the hotel is new, the room is delightful. We cannot find a better hotel in Ben Tre with that pricing. The staffs are friendly and lovely.

reviews.title: A quick stay
reviews.text: Had to visit a friend in Ben Tre. The hotel is situated on the river. Breakfast was good. Room was clean and staff very friendly. Cost was very reasonable. Hotel is starting to look a little dated, but if you are looking for something more upscale, there is a 5 star hotel right next door

reviews.title: Good location, friendly staffs, did not honor agoda/online booking. Becareful
reviews.text: we booked with agoda, booking #274764584. At the time of arrival, they didn’t have our booking and room ready, once we showed them our certificate and booking id, they said they can’t honor that price and asked us to book at the counter for more than what they advertised on agoda for (  for your info: it is for the same type of room).  All other services are good but only one thing that we didn’t like about it is that , they adsvertised with agoda and booking.com but didn’t honor it. So becareful guys...! We don’t have time to file a complaint with agoda so it is better off to write a review, so u guys aware of.

reviews.title: Best in the area. No English. Great Location.
reviews.text:
This is at the edge rather than the heart of the Mekong Delta. The hotel is modern and good value. We took a suite which was absolutely huge and $ p/n on Agoda. Three kids were in a Junior Triple which had two rooms and was also very large ($56).

The location is ideal, and we enjoyed th enight market just along the street.

"Uc" means Australia, yet this hotel caters mainly for Vietnamese. The staff had very little English and the breakfast was very Vietnamese. Still, what else do you expect in Vietnam! Make sure you have Google-translate handy.
reviews.positives: Modern hotel overlooking the river, low cost, high standards and right near the nigh market.

reviews.title: Very good for a budget hotel
reviews.text: A/c unit in our room wasn't great but other than that pleased with what we got for our money
reviews.positives: Clean,decent sized room,safe box,Located on riverfront,comfortable bed,hot water

reviews.title: Quite good.
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located, close to the market and right by the Ben Tre River. From here, shopping and strolling along the riverbank are easy. The staff is polite and dedicated to assisting guests.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel has clean rooms, but there is no swimming pool. For breakfast, some days there is a buffet and other days you can order from the menu.

reviews.title: Improve wifi
reviews.text: The internet wifi system is really bad.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Good hotel in Bên Tre

My stay is very satisfied (I stayed at VietUc almost every year)

Great hotel.  I guest that you have received a few comments regarding the position of the shower location that narrow out the toilet room.
reviews.positives: Nice huge entrance always air conditionered with beverage serving if desired. Big rooms. Excellenet breakfast.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: Great stay at the Viet Uc! Good location right on the Mekong, friendly staff who all did their best given their limited English/our limited Vietnamese. Rooms clean and very comfortable, couldn't ask for more from a three star hotel.
reviews.positives: Location, rooms, value

reviews.title: great hotel but breakfast was a big let down
reviews.text: Very happy with the staff and service although the breakfast was not western friendly at all. In fact my Vietnamese wife also found the breakfast selection lacking. This put us off eating dinner here and we ate out each night. But the staff are great and very helpful.
reviews.positives: friendly staff...comfort....location

reviews.title: Quiet, Comfortable, Friendly
reviews.positives: Attentive staff, peaceful surroundings, good internet connection

reviews.title: good

Good location and clean but air conditional is a little bit noisy

breakfast is so so.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Will be back again & again

reviews.title: Very pleasant and wonderful stay!
reviews.text: My sister and I were surprised with how well the hotel helped accommodated on our requests, great friendly staffs and great location to surrounding attractions.  Staffs were very helpful in addressing our concerns and the manager was very nice.  We would love to come again in our future visit.

reviews.title: Excellent choice
reviews.text: Very enjoyable. Hotel is excellent value for money. Staff were efficient and friendly. Room was extremely comfortable. Great night sleep. The view was an added bonus. I would stay here again.
reviews.positives: Value, luxury, location

reviews.title: Brand new hotel in great location
reviews.text:
We have just spent one night at the Viet Uc hotel and found it very pleasant.   We were upgraded to a suite and loved the views.

The most important thing to stress is the eager friendliness of the staff on the front desk, in the bar and in the restaurant. From information on bus timetables for travel further into the Delta, through producing a pen when the waiter noticed we needed to mark something in our travel guide to another waiter offering to heat up the coffee if we didn't find it hot enough. There was also the waitress keen to improve her English and taking her serving duties so seriously and the door man who gave much helpful information.

Our room was bright, fresh, spacious and comfortable and, being on a high floor overlooking the river, we had wonderful views of the river craft and the coconut plantation beyond. There are no English language news programmes on the television, but we have found that elsewhere in the Delta, even in a city with far more foreign tourists. The wifi only works in the public areas on the ground floor and, even there, it was a bit sporadic.

We had a good dinner in the restaurant, squid, steamed with ginger, and prawns deep fried in coconut batter were the highlights, together with a reasonable bottle of Dalat wine. Breakfast was a little short on fresh fruits, juice or fresh bread, but the Vietnamese offerings were varied and there were good omelettes

The hotel is right beside the main market, which is well worth a visit.
reviews.positives: Location beside the city market and the river, with views over the coconut plantations

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and service with a smile
reviews.text: the internet speed is found very fast in hotel room and in the waiting lobby. the bed is so comfortable and the breakfast is also good with vietnamese and western food choices. it is one of the best hotels with good value for money in ben tre.
reviews.positives: Customer-focused services with free breakfast and nice and clean hotel room with all basic facilities in place.

reviews.title: Okay!
reviews.text:
Easy to find location, near the river, cool.  
Breakfast: mediocre to bad (a la carte), it would be better to have a breakfast buffet.

reviews.title: Top Hotel an zentraler Lage
reviews.text: Zimmer Richtung Fluss buchen!

reviews.title: Great hotel !
reviews.text: I have visited Ben tre for the past 4 years and this is the best hotel I ever stay !!! Very new and clean like a 4 star hotel located at Ben tre ! The breakfast wasn't that good but what can I complaint for the price I paid ! I wanted to book a delux room but not available anymore . The superior room is spacious as well but definitely gonna book the delux room for my next year visit !! Well done viet uc and agora ! See u again next Chinese New Year !!
reviews.positives: Very new hotel

reviews.title: Great location and Nine Hotel
reviews.text: The location of the hotel was the best, the room was clear and the staff is helpful and friendly, breakfast is very good, I will come back for next time.
reviews.positives: I Love this Hotel

Dear Customers!
VIET UC Hotel would like to express our sincere and deepest thanks to our customers for trusting and using our services. Your trust has greatly contributed to the development and success of the hotel in the past time. We also hope to continue to receive your attention and trust in the future.
Sincerely!

reviews.title: Standard 3*
reviews.text: I booked a room for my family. The prices of the rooms are commensurate with the amenities and the surrounding landscape (near the river, right in the center of the market, making it cool and quite convenient to move around). Especially, the breakfast menu is appealing and very delicious, true to the restaurant's long-standing reputation.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Wide room - near Ben Tre night market - river view - friendly staff.
reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý Khách!
Khách sạn VIỆT ÚC xin gửi lời cám ơn chân thành và sâu sắc nhất đến Quý khách hàng đã tin tưởng và sử dụng dịch vụ của chúng tôi. Sự tin tưởng của quý vị đã góp phần lớn quyết định sự phát triển và thành công của khách sạn trong thời gian qua.
Chúng tôi cũng hy vọng trong thời gian tới sẽ tiếp tục nhận được sự quan tâm và tín nhiệm của Quý khách.
Xin chúc quý khách hàng sức khỏe, may mắn và thành công
Trân Trọng!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I had a wonderful vacation here. The bedroom is comfortable and well-equipped.

reviews.title: Great service
reviews.text: Very clean and friendly

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and new.

reviews.title: terrific surprise
reviews.text: Staff here was terrific, very friend and helpful, room was very quiet and bed comfortable. Breakfast buffet was outstanding, western and Asian  options with many choices. I honestly cannot think of anything I did not like.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Good location

reviews.title: It is nice and friendly service.
reviews.text: I will come back.

reviews.title: Nice Stay in Ben Tre
reviews.text:
We really appreciated the Viet Uc Hotel. 
The room was good and the view excellent. 
The lobby lounge was relaxing and good for enjoying time in Ben Tre. 
I will definitely recommend the Viet Uc for future. 
In December 15 to 17 there are 10 teachers from south australia planning to stay there for 2 nights. 
We will book once our trip is confirmed

reviews.title: Exceptionally great
reviews.text: We loved our stay at viet uc, ben tre. From the warmest welcome to outstanding staff performance, from beautiful window view to comfort at every corner, from varieties of buffet selection to mouth watering dinning, the best pork ribs ever.. The overall standard was outstanding, we were highly satisfied and would highly recommend this hotel, no doubt about it.  I wanna thank this hotel for making our stay just beautiful and memorable.
reviews.positives: Dedicated staffs, amazing view and high standard

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: I thought the hotel was excellent value for money ..very clean .room were a very good size for long stay ...I can not think off one bad thing to say about this hotel ...
reviews.positives: the room the food the location

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel and great value
reviews.text: This hotel is a gem! We really enjoyed our stay here. The staff are fantastic and the hotel is of high quality.
reviews.positives: Modern and very comfortable

reviews.title: great hotel with great service
reviews.text: This brand new hotel must have the best river views in Ben Tre. We stayed in a superior river view room with high quality furniture and a super comfortable bed. The bathroom was well fitted with a shower enclosure (unusual in East Asia) and the sound insulation of the rooms was very good. Staff were friendly and the reception staff spoke good English. The included breakfast buffet was of good quality with plenty of choice
reviews.positives: location

reviews.title: Great location great hotel reasonable cost
reviews.text: I can' say enough goods things about this hotel. We had a beutiful room and the staff were all very professional and curtious. Great buffet breakfast  and stylish lounge area to have a drink. This is like a four star hotel for the price of a two star.
reviews.positives: Service, location, facilities and breakfast all first class

reviews.title: Best hotel we stay in vietnam in 2 months
reviews.text: Perfect, you cant belive is so cheap. Everything was great. Totally recomend this hotel,
reviews.positives: Bes value for mony

reviews.title: We love the hotel and service and extremely clean.
reviews.text: we love the hotel and service and extremely clean. it is only a three star hotel but we feel like stay in with the five star hotel.
reviews.positives: The hotel is next to the main super market of Ben-Tre and the reviver right in front of the hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Style un peu vieillot.

reviews.title: Bon hôtel très bien situé.
reviews.text: Le petit déjeuner pourrait être amélioré. Aucun fruits n' est servi et aucun jus de fruits frais pour cette belle région de Ben Tre où les fruits sont pourtant excellants.  Le café n'est pas digne d'un café vietnamien. La nourriture est bonne mais nous avons eu 6 petit déjeuner à la carte durant notre séjour, aucun service buffet. Les employés sont tous gentils.

reviews.title: Le petit déjeuner pourrait être amélioré.
reviews.text: Nous sommes agréablement surpris de la propreté de l'établissement. Le personnel est professionnel. Les points négatifs sont que le buffet n' est pas servi par manque de clientèle. Le petit déjeuner est à la carte. Le café n'est pas bon. Les jus de fruits ne sont pas de vrai jus de fruits. Il arrive de manquer de la nourriture lors du déjeuner même s'il n'y a pas beaucoup de clients et que l'on ne serve aucun fruits de la région de Ben Tre où les fruits abondent.

reviews.title: Très agréable avec belle vue
reviews.text: La chambre était très spacieuse et la salle de bain aussi, très propre, la localisation à Ben ter est parfaite avec vue sur le fleuve et les palmiers à perte de vue. Le restaurant est pas mal avec un bon service et le déjeuner aussi. Personnel sympathique.
reviews.positives: Chambre spacieuse, propre, belle vue sur le fleuve

reviews.title: chambre confortable mais...
reviews.text:
tres bel hotel un peu surprenant d'ailleurs dans ce village perdu du Mékong.
Attention il est tres difficile de se faire comprendre du personnel qui maitrise peu l'anglais.
Petit déjeuner déplorable sauf si vous déjeunez asiatique : pas de beurre, pas de confiture, du pain si vous avez de la chance et qu'il en reste...et du café froid sauf si vous vous levez à 6H
Dommage pour un hotel de ce standing!
Sinon rien à faire à Ben Tre mais les excursions dans le delta sont magnifiques
reviews.positives: propreté, confort

reviews.title: Belle vue sur la rivière  de bên tre.
reviews.text: Hôtel est bien placé. Propre,personnel est aimable. Je reviendrai
reviews.response: Thank you. The hotel is pleased to serve you in the near future.

reviews.title: hôtel récent, très bon rapport qualité-prix
reviews.text: Bel hôtel récent, situé face à la rivière, en plein centre, près du marché. Literie confortable et souple (rare au vietnam), belle décoration. De nombreux asiatique, ce qui est un signe de bon rapport qualité-prix. Un des meilleurs hôtel de la ville.
reviews.positives: hôtel récent, literie confortable et souple (rare au vietnam), attention du personnel (renseignements)

reviews.title: Au top
reviews.text: Très bon emplacement à proximité du marché et du parc, idéal pour balade, personnel bien aimable, chambre comfortable et spacieuse.

reviews.title: No more EXISTING!
reviews.text: Das Hotel gibt es garnicht, aber Agoda geht dem nicht nach.

reviews.title: Großes, sauberes Businesshotel
reviews.text: Geräumiges gut ausgestattetes Zimmer mit Kingsizebett und riesiger Zudecke, Teetisch mit 2 Sesseln, Schminktisch , großer FlatTV, Frühstücksbuffet hauptsächlich asiatisch mit kaltem Kaffee und nur Ingwertee Eier nach Wunsch frisch zubereitet.
reviews.positives: Großes Zimmer, Bequemes Bett, Duschkabine mit Monsundusche

reviews.title: Tolles preiswertes HOTEL
reviews.text: Große saubere Zimmer ,großes Badezimmer  Frühstück gute Auswahl
reviews.positives: Große Zimmer.Gute Massage

reviews.title: Hervorragendes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.text: Wir waren sehr überrascht, dass wir in Ben Tre noch kaum Tourismus vorgefunden haben. Einer der schönsten Märkte unserer Vietnam Reise befindet sich kaum 100m vom Hotel entfernt. Der Blick auf den Fluss ist sehr beruhigend uns wir hatten das Gefühl in einem unberührten Teil Vietnams zu sein. Sehr empfehlenswert!
reviews.positives: 1. Lage. 2. toller Preis und sehr angenehmer Service.

reviews.title: Empfehlenswert
reviews.text: prima Hotel mit großen sauberen Zimmern und sehr guten netten Service. Hervorzuheben ist speziell Thin für seine freundliche Hilfsbereitschaft. noch mal

reviews.title: Sehr gute Basis
reviews.positives: Sehr sauber, bequeme Betten, zentrale schöne Lage am Fluss

reviews.title: Sehr sauberes, komfortables Hotel für Spottpreis!
reviews.text: Wundervolles Hotel, für die Verhältnisse in Ben tre sogar sehr luxuriös und dazu eben der Preis von ca 15€ pro Person ist geradezu lachhaft. Bei unserem Aufenthalt war es sehr sauber, aber ehrlich gesagt haben wir uns gefragt wie es möglich ist dieses Hotel bei den Preisen instand zu halten...:) die Massagen waren auch sehr gut und verdammt billig, ich glaube etwas um 5€ pro 45min. Das essen war gut, aber dagegen etwas teuerer, was aber nicht schlimm ist, da man direkt am Markt wohnt und sich dort oder in nahegelegenen Restaurants sein essen besorgen kann. Alles in allem waren wir mehr als zufrieden und bezweifeln dass wir je ein ähnlich gutes preisleistungsverhältnis finden.
reviews.positives: Essen, Zimmer, Massagen

reviews.title: Grossartiges Hotel
reviews.positives: Grosse & saubere Zimmer, super Frühstücksbuffet

reviews.title: Wunderbar zum Abschalten
reviews.text: Wer Vietnam abseits der Touri Highlights erleben will, sollte auch in Ben Tre halt machen. Das Revolutionary Museum ist einen Besuch wert und die Sonne über dem Mekong aufgehen sehen ist wunderbar. Das Hotel ist sauber, hat sehr hilfsbereites Personal, die Zimmer sind gut, und die Aussicht famos.

reviews.title: Hotel hat den Aufenthalt im Mekongdelta verschoent
reviews.text: Alles hat gestimmt. Hier gibt es nichts zu beschweren.
reviews.positives: Fruehstueck, Massage, Lage

reviews.title: ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo
reviews.text: L'Hotel è una buona base di partenza per visitare il della del Mekong
reviews.positives: centrale, stanze grandi e pulite,  ottima vista

reviews.title: Fantastisch hotel, goede ligging, hoge service.
reviews.text: Ben Tre op zich is een recht toe recht aan stad(je) met veel kleine winkeltjes en markt. Echt Aziatisch. Langs de rivier. Een goede plaats om een vaartocht door de Mekong te doen. Hotel is zeer luxe, zeer hoge prijs kwaliteit verhouding, geweldige bar (cocktails) en wel 7 zalen voor Karaoke, wat leuk is om mee te doen met de lokale bevolking.
reviews.positives: Service, ligging, comfortable.

reviews.title: いいホテルでした
reviews.text: いいホテルだったんだけど、あ、そういえば、家族で行ったんだけど、1つの部屋が、照明の球がついていない、ポットがない、ドライヤーがないという部屋に泊まりました。別の借りてる部屋からもってきて使ったんだけど、返すの忘れて、チェックアウトのときにないですよ～ってフロントに言われた。事情を説明して、何とかわかってもらえたんだけど、なんやそれっていう感じでした。
reviews.positives: オムレツ、部屋はまあまあ、ウォシュレットがついてる部屋もあった

reviews.title: 雄大なメコン川の流れとヤシの木の眺め
reviews.text:
部屋に通された後、まず飛び込んでくるのは部屋正面にある窓からの風景でした。
ホテル前の「Hung Vuong」通りの向こうを流れるメコン川の流れと、その向こうにある密林。どこまでも続くヤシの木の眺めはなかなか壮観で、面白いです。
また訪れた時期がテト正月前ということで、ホテル前の通りには正月用のスイカの売店が立ち並び、カラフルで美しかったです。
朝食のビュッフェは種類は少ないものの、最低限の品は揃っています。
ロビーと隣接するカフェ・バーも清潔で過ごしやすい雰囲気でした。
reviews.positives: 川の風景　清潔な部屋　大きな窓

reviews.title: いいホテルでした
reviews.positives: 食事、部屋、料金

reviews.title: ベントレーで、一番良いホテル
reviews.text:
良いホテルでした。設備も新しく、スタッフの対応も良かったです。
朝食は、日本人にも合う味付けです。とてもおいしかった。

ホテルで１度だけ夕食をとりましたが、食べたいものが品切れだと言われた事と、４人で１品づつ頼んだのですが
１品が４人分の量で、食べきれませんでした。私たちも量の事はわからなかったですが、ウエイターが気遣いしてくれなかったのが、残念です。

ホーチミンのホテルにも負けないくらい良いホテルでした。
おすすめのホテルです。
reviews.positives: スタッフの対応が良い、朝食がおいしい、部屋がきれい

reviews.title: 편안한 호텔, 하지만 모든것이 노멀한
reviews.text:
직원 응대는 친절하려 노력하는 모습이 보였다. 주차장이 좁아서 주차구역 확보가 시급해 보인다.
주변 여행할곳이 적당치 않고, 놀이시설또한 별로 없어 근처 갈일이 없다면 여행지로는 좋지않은 위치라 생각된다.
reviews.positives: 조용함, 편안함, 노멀한 음식

reviews.title: 선택의 여지가 없는 이동네 최고의 호텔
reviews.text: 깔끔하고 가성비 좋음
reviews.positives: 전망이 좋고 식당이 가격대비 먹을만 하고 객실이 넓음

reviews.title: 깔끔하고 가성비 좋은 호텔
reviews.text: 있을건 다 있는 3성 호텔
reviews.positives: 식당. 깔끔한 객실. 가성비좋음

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: vòi tắm kém , ko có nước nóng , không có trang bị gì

reviews.title: Trang thiet bi phong tam cu ky , khong sach se
reviews.text: Khong duoc hai long cho lam , va bi tieng on ao gay ra tu phong Lan can
reviews.positives: Gan trung tam cho, tiem cafe lich su, thoang mat vi gan bo song

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: tạm được vì Hotel đã cũ

reviews.title: Nhân viên không thân thiện
reviews.text:
Ưu điểm:
- Vị trí: Gần trung tâm, cách chợ đêm 30m
- Tiện nghi: Khá ổn so với tiêu chuẩn 3*
- Có quán cafe ngay Sảnh khá hợp lý
Nhược điểm:
- Nhân viên: nhân viên lễ tân NAM nói chuyen với KH cộc lốc, không niềm nở,....
- WIfi: Quá tệ, ko bat sóng được. Lúc xuông ăn sáng nghe phòng nào cung than phiền về việc này
Ghé lại: sẽ xem xét chứ không chắc chắn
Thích Ben Tre Resort Reverside hơn

reviews.title: Yên tĩnh, sạch sẽ
reviews.text:
Khách sạn có ưu điểm gần chợ và dọc bờ sông nên tầm nhìn thoáng đãng, gần trung tâm nên tiện cho việc đi chơi đi chợ.
Tuy nhiên ks lại không có hồ bơi nên hơi đáng tiếc
Quán cafe trong khách sạn thưc uống không đăc sắc.
reviews.positives: Vị trí

reviews.title: Tot
reviews.text: Nhan vien rat than thien

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt
reviews.text: Chưa tìm được lựa chọn tốt hơn ở Bến Tre
reviews.positives: (1) Vị trí đẹp, (2) Khách sạn mới, (3) Nhân viên thân thiện

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: giá phòng cao vì ở ngay khu vực trung tâm nhưng quá cao so với nội thất (toilet, máy lạnh ...) nên ở mức giá 500k/ đêm. Giá phòng niêm yết trên agoda cao hơn so với khách sạn

reviews.title: Khách sạn khá ổn..
reviews.text: Vị trí đối diện sông. Có điều phía sau đang xây dựng nên hết sức ồn ào, khách sạn còn nhiều phòng trống nhưng lại sắp xếp cho tôi ở phòng có cửa ra vào ngay vị trí cửa sổ đối diện công trường?! Tôi đi nghỉ dưỡng - thư giãn mà như bị tra tấn khi ở trong phòng vì công trường làm cả ngày lẫn đêm.

reviews.title: Khách sạn sạch đẹp
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng, sạch, địa điểm tốt,đồ ăn ngon

reviews.title: khách sạn đáng yêu với thái độ phục vụ niềm nở
reviews.text: Tôi thật sự rất hài lòng về kỳ nghỉ của mình. Đây thật sự là một khách sạn tuyệt vời về chất lượng cùng với mức giá cả rất hợp lý
reviews.positives: trang thiết bị của phòng rất tốt, phòng ốc sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, tác phong phục vụ chuyên nghiệp, chu đáo

reviews.title: tien nghi
reviews.text: ks thieu bao tri. Neu khong giai quyet kip thoi se bi xuong cap

reviews.title: Ben Tre
reviews.text: Tốt

reviews.title: Buffet chán, quá ít món
reviews.text: Tạm ổn, buffet chán ngắt, ít món, ko có lựa chị, chỉ đỡ hơn Diamond

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: tot
reviews.positives: phong dep

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text: Cảm thấy hài lòng với ks Việt Úc, nếu ks có Hồ bơi thì tuyệt vời hơn .
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch sẽ, vị trí tốt , nhân viên nhiệt tình , vui vẽ

reviews.title: Khách sạn đẹp
reviews.text: Gia đình tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Khách sạn ơ vị trí đẹp, vệ sinh sạch, nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Khách sạn nhân viên dễ sương
reviews.text: Nhân viên tận tình tận tâm chu đáo, nên ở nhà ace

reviews.title: Khách sạn khá tốt so với tầm giá...
reviews.positives: Thoáng rộng mát mẻ.:.

reviews.title: Khách sạn sang trọng tại trung tâm
reviews.text:
Khách sạn Việt Úc là khách sạn lớn và sang trọng nằm tại trung tâm thành phố Bến Tre. 
Khung cảnh xung quanh khách sạn đẹp, nằm kế bên là nhà bảo tàng Bến Tre và đối diện khách sạn là dòng sông thơ mộng. 
Vị trí khách sạn gần chợ và các dịch vụ tour vùng sông nước nên rất thuận tiện cho việc đi lại tham quan, mua sắm và ăn uống.
Phòng ốc khách sạn rất sang trọng, sạch sẽ. Nhân viên khách sạn lịch sự và rất nhã nhặn.
Buffet buổi sáng tại đây đa dạng có nhiều món ăn ngon.
Gia đình chúng tôi rất hài lòng khi nghỉ tại khách sạn này.
reviews.positives: Vị trí đẹp và thuận tiện tham quan, mua sắm và ăn uống

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Không được phục vụ buffet sáng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ăn sáng hơi đơn điệu

reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý Khách!
Khách sạn VIỆT ÚC xin gửi lời cám ơn chân thành và sâu sắc nhất đến Quý khách hàng đã tin tưởng và sử dụng dịch vụ của chúng tôi.
Sự tin tưởng của quý vị đã góp phần lớn quyết định sự phát triển và thành công của khách sạn trong thời gian qua.
Chúng tôi cũng hy vọng trong thời gian tới sẽ tiếp tục nhận được sự quan tâm và tín nhiệm của Quý khách.
Xin chúc quý khách hàng sức khỏe, may mắn và thành công
Trân Trọng!
